overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy standing on a wooden platform edge overlooking a massive waterfall in a misty tribal settlement. The character turns and walks back along elevated wooden pathways through a primitive village built over rushing water, revealing jungle vegetation and tribal huts.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden platform edge overlooking massive waterfall

events.description: character turns around from facing the waterfall to facing back toward the village

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of a wooden platform, looking out over the massive waterfall and misty chasm

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow platform edge
large waterfall cascading down into misty depths
steep rock wall adjacent to the waterfall
water mist rising from the falling water

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the edge of a wooden platform overlooking a massive waterfall. Mist rises from the cascading water below as the camera pans slightly, showing the wooden planks and rocky cliff face. The character then turns around to face back toward the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkways through tribal village over water

events.description: village structures and tribal huts become prominently visible as character walks away from waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated wooden pathways back toward the tribal village center

entered.detail: primitive wooden hut with thatched roof on stilts over the water
suspension bridge made of ropes connecting platforms
vertical wooden beams supporting the walkway structure
dense tropical trees and foliage surrounding the village

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the wooden walkways away from the waterfall edge. Tribal huts on stilts and rope bridges become visible on the left as the village structures emerge from the mist. The waterfall remains visible to the right while the path leads deeper into the jungle settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a breathtaking overlook of a massive waterfall into the heart of a misty tribal settlement. It begins with the character standing at the edge of a wooden platform, where mist rises from the cascading water against a rocky cliff face. As the character turns away from the precipice, the camera follows her back along elevated wooden walkways, leaving the roar of the falls behind. The scene then expands to reveal tribal huts on stilts and rope bridges emerging from the haze on the left, while the waterfall remains a distant presence to the right. Finally, the path leads deeper into the jungle settlement, shifting the focus from the open vista to the intricate architecture of the village.
